top_patterns.description: Starts with personal reflection or gratitude, often expressing thanks or appreciation.
top_patterns.structure_template: I am grateful for... / Thank you for... / I love...
top_patterns.when_it_appears: frequently at start or middle of captions
example_quotes: I’m grateful for all the reading recommendations you all have sent.
Thank you @araksyakarapetyan for having me on yesterday.

top_patterns.description: Shares personal feelings, experiences, or insights directly, often in first person.
top_patterns.structure_template: Today I... / I love being... / I realized...
top_patterns.when_it_appears: throughout captions, often as main body
example_quotes: Today I sit with a heaviness for so many souls...

top_patterns.description: Includes direct invitations or prompts, often with a link or hashtag.
top_patterns.structure_template: Link in bio / Swipe right / How are you finding balance?
example_quotes: How are you finding balance in this new normal?

archetypal_structures.formula: I am grateful for... / Thank you... / I love...
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Express appreciation, set a positive tone
example_quotes: I’m grateful for all the reading recommendations you all have sent.
Thank you @araksyakarapetyan for having me on yesterday.

archetypal_structures.formula: Today I... / I realized... / I love being...
example_quotes: Today I sit with a heaviness for so many souls...

archetypal_structures.formula: Link in bio / Swipe right / How are you?
example_quotes: How are you finding balance in this new normal?

language_habits.line_break_style: frequent line breaks after opening or key points

example_quotes: Today I sit with a heaviness for so many souls...
Thank you @araksyakarapetyan for having me on yesterday.
I am grateful for all the reading recommendations...

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal touch

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Authentic, personal, gratitude-driven, reflective, with a focus on connection and growth.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More vulnerability, less polished, more conversational and emotionally open.
